'''Kee-Piru''' was a floating city on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], located near the [[Mester Reef]] in the southern territorial zone.

==History==
Along with [[Heurkea Floating City|Heurkea]], it took much of the [[World Devastator]] damage during the [[Battle of Calamari]], resulting in a minimum of tens of thousands of deaths.

[[Kee-Piru Computronics]] was located in the city.
